sources.name: Wizards — Marvel Super Heroes Jumpstart Booster Themes
sources.provides: Confirms the product has 51 themes, the two-pack Jumpstart structure, official theme names and taglines, and the Power-Up / Teamwork keywords.

sources.name: Wizards — MTG Arena Marvel Super Heroes Event Schedule
sources.provides: Arena Jump Into Marvel Super Heroes event format: choose two packets, play to 2 wins or 3 losses.

sources.name: MTGABuddy — Jump Into Marvel Super Heroes packet list
sources.provides: The 51 Arena packets with rare slots, card counts, theme text, and random-slot probabilities. Best source for exact packet contents.

sources.name: Untapped — Marvel Super Heroes Premier Draft card data
sources.provides: Card-level win stats and match volume for MSH Premier Draft. Informs card quality, NOT Jump In pair win rates.

sources.name: 17Lands — Marvel Super Heroes
sources.provides: Card-level Premier Draft performance (GIH WR, etc.).

sources.name: Limited Grades — MSH tier list
sources.provides: 17Lands data turned into a fast card tier list.

sources.name: Scryfall — Marvel Super Heroes (MSH)
sources.provides: Searchable card records: names, types, mana costs, images, set codes.

sources.name: MTG Arena Zone — MSH Limited archetypes guide
sources.provides: The ten draft archetypes, useful for labelling packet plans.

sources.name: Draftsim — Marvel Jumpstart guide & set review
sources.provides: Jumpstart guide and Limited set review for rough packet strength when no direct win-rate data exists.

missingData.what: Public Jump Into Marvel PAIR win-rate data (e.g. 'Marvelous + Blink has X% win rate' inside the Arena event).
missingData.status: Not found publicly. Packet contents, card stats, and draft archetype stats exist; event-specific pair win rates do not.
missingData.consequence: All pair rankings in this app are ESTIMATED from heuristics until you import tracked Jump In match results on the Data Sources page.
